evidence.source_title: GEC-ESTRO ACROP recommendations in skin brachytherapy.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 29455924. 2018/03/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Several radiotherapeutic approaches for patients with oligotopic 
malignant liver lesions unfit for surgical resection exist. The most advanced 
competitive techniques are high-dose-rate (HDR) brachytherapy, Cyberknife, 
volume-modulated-arc therapy (VMAT) and Tomotherapy. We evaluated the optimal 
technique by a planning study for a single ablative dose with different lesion 
sizes.
METHODS: We compared dose distributions of HDR-brachytherapy w
